mapper.select: select t1.* ,t2.* from esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist t1 left join esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist_detail t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.inspection_id = t2.inspection_id where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t2.use_yn = 'Y' order by t1.ord_seq asc, t2.ord_seq asc
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER, 0) + 1)::TEXT,5,'0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_contractor_investigation_form WHERE write_year = #{writeYear}
insert into esg.tb_contractor_investigation_form ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, part_comp_id, part_comp_nm, "desc", part_comp_item, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, exam_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by, reg_dt ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{partCompId}, #{partCompNm}, #{desc}, #{partCompItem}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{examDt}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{regDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_contractor_investigation_form SET part_comp_id = #{partCompId}, part_comp_nm = #{partCompNm}, "desc" = #{desc}, part_comp_item = #{partCompItem}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, exam_dt = #{examDt}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, reg_dt = #{regDt} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT lpad((coalesce(max(substring(doc_seq, 1, 5)::integer), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docSeq FROM esg.tb_contractor_investigation_form_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
insert into esg.tb_contractor_investigation_form_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_id, inspection_id, inspection_nm, inspection_item_id, inspection_item_nm, upper_score, middle_score, lower_score, "comment", score, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{compId}, #{inspectionId}, #{inspectionNm}, #{inspectionItemId}, #{inspectionItemNm}, #{upperScore}, #{middleScore}, #{lowerScore}, #{comment}, #{score}, now(), #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO esg.tb_contractor_investigation_pass_score( comp_id, write_year, score, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{compId}, #{writeYear}, #{score}, NOW(), #{id} )
mapper.select: select t1.* from esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist t1 where t1.comp_id = #{compId} order by t1.use_yn desc, t1.ord_seq asc

select t1.* , t2.inspection_nm from esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist_detail t1 left join esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.inspection_id = t2.inspection_id where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.inspection_id = #{inspectionId} order by t1.use_yn desc, t1.ord_seq asc
select t1.* from dataset.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist t1 where t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by t1.ord_seq asc

select t1.* , t2.inspection_nm from dataset.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist_detail t1 left join dataset.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist t2 on t1.inspection_id = t2.inspection_id where t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t1.inspection_id = #{inspectionId} order by t1.ord_seq asc
mapper.insert:
select case when #{inspectionId}::varchar is null or #{inspectionId}::varchar = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(inspection_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{inspectionId}::varchar end as inspectionId from esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist where inspection_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist ( comp_id, inspection_id, inspection_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) values( #{compId}, #{inspectionId}, #{inspectionNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )

select case when #{inspectionItemId}::varchar is null or #{inspectionItemId}::varchar = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(inspection_item_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{inspectionItemId}::varchar end as inspectionItemId from esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist_detail where inspection_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_contractor_checklist_detail ( comp_id, inspection_id, inspection_item_id, inspection_item_nm, upper_score, middle_score, lower_score, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{compId}, #{inspectionId}, #{inspectionItemId}, #{inspectionItemNm}, #{upperScore}, #{middleScore}, #{lowerScore}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
